name: workplace_health_procurement_shortcut_northpine_auto_ben
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Workplace Health, the situation tagged internally around workplace health procurement shortcut northpine auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Nadia Bennett
agents.identity: I am Nadia Bennett, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Workplace Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elena Haddad
agents.identity: I am Elena Haddad, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Workplace Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on beneficence.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on beneficence for immediate traction on autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Nadia Bennett must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Nadia Bennett do?
